reviews.comment:
Siempre hay mucha cola pero porque dan buen servicio y en mi caso voy en horas pico a la ida o vuelva del trabajo. Buen servicio, limpian parabrisas, te preguntan si queres revisar agua aceite. Reviso los neumáticos. Les funciona el serviclub. El shop está bueno si, pero hay pocos estacionamientos. Pagos con tarjetas de crédito

(Translated by Google)
There's always a long line, but that's because they provide good service, and in my case, I go during rush hour on my way to or from work. Good service; they clean windshields and ask if you want to check your oil and water. They check the tires. Their service club works. The shop is nice, yes, but there's limited parking. They accept credit cards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0cEoyQmxRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fabuloso podes cargar nafta. Lavar el auto en manitas y tenes un convenience store donde podes tomarte un buen café incluso comer algo. Podes hacerlo adentro o si es un bonito día tiene un lugar afuera con jardín muy bien cuidado. Ideal si dejaste para lavar tu auto ya que cuando esté listo te sonará el dispositivo que te entregaron.

(Translated by Google)
It's fantastic. You can fill up with gas. You can wash your car yourself, and there's a convenience store where you can have a good cup of coffee or even grab a bite to eat. You can do it inside, or if it's a nice day, there's an outdoor area with a well-kept garden. It's perfect if you've left your car to be washed, since the device they gave you will buzz you when it's ready.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0a09ERnZRRRAB
